TestCase z7Change(TestCase t1) {
    TestCase follow_case = t1;
    // --- Memory handling code generated based on the rule ---
    double* follow_case_sortedElements = (double*)malloc(t1.n * sizeof(double));
    memcpy(follow_case_sortedElements, t1.sortedElements, t1.n * sizeof(double));
    follow_case.sortedElements = follow_case_sortedElements;
    // ------------------------------------
    
    // Defensive check: ensure there is at least one element
    if (follow_case.n == 0) {
        return follow_case;
    }
    
    // Set a random element to -100.0 if it is greater than -100.0
    int idx = rand() % follow_case.n;
    if (follow_case.sortedElements[idx] > -100.0) {
        follow_case.sortedElements[idx] = -100.0;
    }
    
    return follow_case;
}
